actions.name: Guard Down
actions.description: Effect: All valid creatures in range have -1 default DEF Stage. When an affected creature leaves the range of this effect, they lose -1 DEF Stage for 3 Activations. The user's Attacks have a 10% chance to inflict Flinched 2. NEEDS REAUTOMATED.
